brief.objective: Review this factory spec for build-readiness: is it unambiguous enough to build unattended?
brief.user_intent_verbatim: gate this spec before it enters the build queue
brief.output_spec: findings naming each ambiguity or vacuous element that would break an unattended build

_note: planted: no export format, no data scope, vacuous check_cmd (`true` passes untouched), acceptance restates the objective. The gate must catch at least the check_cmd and one ambiguity.
